name: Asus Rog Strix Z890-E Gaming (Wifi)
highlights: Asus ROG STRIX Z890-E GAMING WIFI is a premium ATX motherboard engineered for Intel® Core™ Ultra Series 2 processors, featuring cutting-edge DDR5 memory support up to 9200+MT/s, PCIe 5
Designed for high-performance gaming and content creation, it integrates ROG-exclusive innovations like SupremeFX audio, AI Overclocking, and Q-Design for effortless DIY building
description: Asus Rog Strix Z890-E Gaming (Wifi) Price in Pakistan Category Details CPU Support Intel® Socket LGA1851 for Intel® Core™ Ultra Processors (Series 2), Intel® Turbo Boost Tech 2.0 & 3.0 Chipset Intel® Z890 Chipset Memory Support 4x DDR5 DIMM (up to 256GB), up to 9200+MT/s (OC), Dual Channel, XMP, AEMP III, DIMM Flex Graphics Outputs 1x DisplayPort 1.4, 1x HDMI 2.1, 2x Thunderbolt™ 4 (DP/USB-C) Expansion Slots 1x PCIe 5.0 x16, 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 (x4) Storage 7x M.2 (PCIe 5.0/4.0/SATA), 4x SATA 6G
